prompt: When a new lead submits a Google Form, create a GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER node with variableName 'formData'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'CategorizeLead' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and this exact userPrompt: 'Analyze the formData and categorize the lead interest level as High, Medium or Low. Return only JSON with keys category and reason.'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendWelcomeEmail' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Welcome' and body 'Hi, your interest level is {{CategorizeLead.category}}. Reason: {{CategorizeLead.reason}}'. Finally create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'AppendLead' with action 'append', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Leads', range 'A:D'. Connect them in this exact order: GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER → MISTRAL → GMAIL → GOOGLE_SHEETS.

Create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'FetchRSS' with method 'GET' and endpoint 'https://api.rss2json.com/v1/api.json?rss_url=https://news.ycombinator.com/rss'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'SummarizePosts' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Summarize the latest 5 blog posts from the rssFeed. Make each summary 2-3 sentences.'. Then create a DISCORD node named 'PostSummaries' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect them: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → DISCORD.

Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'LoadTopics' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Topics', range 'A:B'. Then create a LOOP node named 'ProcessEachTopic' that iterates over {{LoadTopics.data}} using item variableName 'topicItem'. Inside the loop create a MISTRAL node named 'GenerateOutline' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Write a detailed blog outline for this topic: {{topicItem}}'. Then create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'SaveOutline' with action 'create', folderId '1DriveFolderXYZ', and file name '{{topicItem}}_outline'. Connect: GOOGLE_SHEETS → LOOP → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_DRIVE.

When a webhook POST is received, create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'ReceivePost' with method 'POST' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'GenerateHashtags' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Generate 8 relevant hashtags and trending keywords for the post content.'. Then create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'SaveHashtags' with action 'append', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Hashtags', range 'A:C'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_SHEETS.

Manually trigger the workflow. Create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'FetchPricing' with method 'GET' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'MarketAnalysis' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Analyze the pricing data and write a short market positioning report.'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendAnalysis' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Competitor Analysis Report' and body '{{MarketAnalysis.aiResponse}}'. Connect: MANUAL_TRIGGER → HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → GMAIL.

When a high-priority server alert arrives via webhook, create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'ReceiveAlert' with method 'POST' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'AnalyzeError' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Analyze the error logs and suggest immediate troubleshooting steps.'. Then create a DISCORD node named 'PostTroubleshooting' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → DISCORD.

When a new GitHub issue is detected, create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'FetchIssue' with method 'GET' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'SuggestLabels' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Suggest appropriate labels for this GitHub issue based on its title and body.'. Then create a DISCORD node named 'NotifyTeam' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → DISCORD.

Manually trigger the workflow. Create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'FetchCosts' with method 'GET' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create an IF node named 'CheckHighCost' with condition '{{FetchCosts.total}} > 1000'. If true, create a GMAIL node named 'SendAlert' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'High Cloud Costs Alert' and body 'Current spending: {{FetchCosts.total}}'. Connect: MANUAL_TRIGGER → HTTP_REQUEST → IF → GMAIL.

When a new software access request comes via Google Form, create a GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER node with variableName 'formData'. Then create an IF node named 'IsITDepartment' with condition '{{formData.department}} === "IT"'. If true, create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'GrantAccess' with method 'POST' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. If false, create a GMAIL node named 'ForwardRequest' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Access Request Needs Approval'. Connect: GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER → IF → (HTTP_REQUEST and GMAIL).

When a new security log is uploaded to Google Drive, create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'GetLogFile' with action 'read', folderId '1DriveFolderXYZ'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'ScanForThreats' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Scan the logContent for anomalous behavior and return isThreat true or false.'. Then create an IF node named 'ThreatDetected' with condition '{{ScanForThreats.isThreat}} === true'. If true, create a DISCORD node named 'SendAlert' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: GOOGLE_DRIVE → MISTRAL → IF → DISCORD.

Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'ReadLeads' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Leads', range 'A:D'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'DraftOutreach' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Research the company and draft a personalized outreach email based on the leadRow.'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendOutreach' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Collaboration Opportunity'. Connect: GOOGLE_SHEETS → MISTRAL → GMAIL.

When an email is received from 'contact@lead.com' via Gmail, create a GMAIL node named 'ReadIncomingEmail' with variableName 'incomingEmail'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'SentimentAnalysis' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Perform sentiment analysis on the incomingEmail and return positive, neutral or negative.'. Then create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'UpdateStatus' with action 'append', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Status', range 'A:C'. Connect: GMAIL → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_SHEETS.

Manually trigger. Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'ReadProfiles' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Profiles', range 'A:B'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'DraftIcebreaker' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Draft a unique icebreaker message for the LinkedIn profile URL.'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendIcebreaker' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Icebreaker Draft'. Connect: MANUAL_TRIGGER → GOOGLE_SHEETS → MISTRAL → GMAIL.

On Google Form submission for demo request, create a GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER node with variableName 'formData'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'QualifyLead' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Qualify the lead based on form responses and return isQualified true or false.'. Then create an IF node named 'IsQualified' with condition '{{QualifyLead.isQualified}} === true'. If true, create a GMAIL node named 'SendSchedulingLink' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Schedule your demo'. Connect: GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER → MISTRAL → IF → GMAIL.

Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'ReadSalesData' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Sales', range 'A:C'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'SummarizeSales' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Summarize the sales performance data and highlight key trends.'. Then create a DISCORD node named 'PostInsights' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: GOOGLE_SHEETS → MISTRAL → DISCORD.

When a new invoice PDF is uploaded to Google Drive, create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'ReadInvoice' with action 'read', folderId '1InvoiceFolderXYZ'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'ExtractInvoiceData' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Extract invoice number, date and total amount from the PDF content.'. Then create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'AppendInvoice' with action 'append', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Docs', range 'A:C'. Connect: GOOGLE_DRIVE → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_SHEETS.

On Google Form submission with contract details, create a GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER node with variableName 'formData'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'DraftContract' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Draft standard contract text based on the formData.'. Then create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'CreateContractDoc' with action 'create', folderId '1ContractsFolderXYZ'. Connect: GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_DRIVE.

Manually trigger. Create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'ListFiles' with action 'list', folderId '1FilesFolderXYZ'. Then create a LOOP node named 'RenameFiles' that iterates over {{ListFiles.files}} with item variableName 'fileItem'. Inside the loop create a MISTRAL node named 'GenerateFileName' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Generate a clean file name from the fileItem content.'. Then create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'UpdateFile' with action 'update'. Connect: MANUAL_TRIGGER → GOOGLE_DRIVE → LOOP → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_DRIVE.

When a POST webhook is received at 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts', create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'SignatureEvent'. Then create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'DownloadSignedPDF' with action 'read', folderId '1SignedDocsXYZ'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendConfirmation' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Your signed document'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → GOOGLE_DRIVE → GMAIL.

Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'ReadMetadata' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Docs', range 'A:B'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'GenerateSummary' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Generate a 2-sentence summary from the metadataRow.'. Then create a GOOGLE_DRIVE node named 'SaveSummary' with action 'create', folderId '1SummaryFolderXYZ'. Connect: GOOGLE_SHEETS → MISTRAL → GOOGLE_DRIVE.

When a support ticket webhook arrives at 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts', create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'GetTicket'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'SuggestSolution' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Suggest the most likely solution for this ticket.'. Then create a GMAIL node named 'SendReply' that sends to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Ticket Suggested Reply'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → GMAIL.

On Google Form bug report submission, create a GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER node with variableName 'bugReport'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'ExtractSteps' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Extract clear reproduction steps from the bugReport.'. Then create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'CreateGitHubIssue' with method 'POST' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Connect: GOOGLE_FORM_TRIGGER → MISTRAL → HTTP_REQUEST.

Create an HTTP_REQUEST node named 'FetchTweets' with method 'GET' and endpoint 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'DetectSentiment' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Detect if any tweets contain negative feedback and return isNegative true or false.'. Then create an IF node named 'NegativeFeedback' with condition '{{DetectSentiment.isNegative}} === true'. If true, create a DISCORD node named 'PostToSupport' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: HTTP_REQUEST → MISTRAL → IF → DISCORD.

When a customer inquiry arrives via Gmail from 'customer@email.com', create a GMAIL node named 'ReadInquiry'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'ClassifyInquiry' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Classify the inquiry as Technical or General.'. Then create a SWITCH node named 'RouteInquiry' that routes: if classification === 'Technical' send to DISCORD webhook 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath', else reply via GMAIL to 'muhammednemathullahkhan@gmail.com' with subject 'Inquiry routed'. Connect: GMAIL → MISTRAL → SWITCH → (DISCORD and GMAIL).

Manually trigger. Create a GOOGLE_SHEETS node named 'ReadTickets' with action 'read', spreadsheetId '1d5g9yPszvzE8BgcxAX_okP1DX7dzjCH-Y60JYUj0nBc', sheetName 'Support', range 'A:C'. Then create a MISTRAL node named 'PrioritizeTickets' with model 'mistral-large-latest' and userPrompt 'Prioritize the unresolved support tickets and create a summary.'. Then create a DISCORD node named 'PostTriage' with webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1479429896710131916/8L2Ol_L0-KBkfjPH5SozFOqNHdC5FTiE1cdshf03ZNWIDFPdT3WrogMhDgivFARVuHVR' and username 'khan_nemath'. Connect: MANUAL_TRIGGER → GOOGLE_SHEETS → MISTRAL → DISCORD.
